findings.problem: Sanitization drift: the chapter's most dangerous pivot is delivered as paperwork recap and inferred logistics, so embodied consequence gets replaced by abstract summary at the point where the narrative should feel physically imminent.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rebuild the deduction block centered at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:142, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:176, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:178, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:190 so at least one beat renders concrete bodily/social risk in-scene (not just document inventory), then let that beat force the threat-call decision at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:208.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passage anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:142 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:190 includes at least one explicit, on-page material consequence tied to the forecast attack lane and that consequence directly triggers the command notification beat; fail if the turn remains only document-summary plus assertion.

findings.problem: Causal overreach: Lena moves from partial pattern evidence to a single precise kill method/timeline with near-certainty, so the prevention clock reads author-imposed rather than fully earned by shown reasoning.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:174 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:196, stage an explicit elimination of alternatives (house/courthouse/foundation, and at least one non-blade method) before settling on Service Corridor B, then keep Lena's final call as risk-weighted rather than absolute certainty.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised block at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:174 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:196 shows at least two alternate scenarios considered and rejected with concrete reasons from chapter evidence; fail if the text still jumps directly from pattern notes to one deterministic attack script.

findings.problem: Timidity: the Lena-Beau rupture is introduced as potentially career-altering, then quickly cushioned by humor/caretaking, reducing the lasting interpersonal cost the setup promises.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the hospital span at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:22 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:84 so Beau's near-withdrawal carries a concrete operational boundary that remains unresolved at scene exit; keep Ida's interruption, but make it intensify stakes instead of diffusing them.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, after the revised beat anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:26, Beau sets one non-negotiable condition with immediate case impact and that condition is still active by snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:84; fail if the scene resolves to reassurance without an unresolved cost.

findings.problem: Idiolect separation weakens in the late-call sequence: Lena, Beau, and Mara converge on similar clipped quip-plus-command rhythm, which blurs character-register contrast under pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise exchanges at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:132, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:188, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:212 so each speaker carries their profile: Lena procedural/plain, Beau tactile-field idiom with stress-fray, Mara evidence-attribution reframing and skeptical precision.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, in the revised passage anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:132 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:212, each of Lena/Beau/Mara has at least one line that is not swappable with another speaker without breaking voice profile; fail if the lines remain interchangeable in syntax and rhythm.

findings.problem: Recurring prose tic: repeated triadic inventory constructions (A, B, and C) dominate descriptive and analytical beats, flattening rhythm and signaling autopilot sentence shaping.
findings.rewrite_direction: Reshape sentence architecture at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:110, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:142, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:178, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:206, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:226 by converting some lists into action-led or interruption-led syntax while preserving factual content.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised target spans anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:110 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:226 contain no more than two triadic inventory sentences and at least three varied non-list sentence shapes; fail if three or more triadic inventory constructions remain in those target spans.

summary: Chapter 12 preserves canonical continuity and lands the required plot turn, but it does not clear review: a HIGH sanitization-by-summary pivot and a HIGH causality leap weaken the prevention clock, while timidity in relationship fallout, voice convergence in late dialogue, and repeated list-shaped prose keep the chapter below pass level.
